---
name: Roadmap spec (maintainer)
about: Full spec for a planned capability. Used by the maintainer to document roadmap items; for suggestions, use "Feature request" instead.
labels: roadmap
---

# <Feature Name>

## Problem

<!-- What gap in the current library does this address? What do operations
teams do manually today because this is missing? -->

## What It Solves

<!-- Bullet list: concrete outcomes once implemented. -->

## How It Works

<!-- The approach. For math-heavy features, name this section
"Mathematical Approach" and describe candidate options (Option A/B/C)
with trade-offs. Include worked examples with real numbers where possible. -->

## API Surface (Draft)

<!-- Python signatures and/or CLI commands, as fenced code blocks.
Mark clearly as draft — naming follows README terminology
(traffic_rate, sla, aht, interval...). -->

## Complexity

<!-- Implementation effort and mathematical difficulty. -->

## Dependencies

<!-- Other roadmap items or existing modules this builds on or affects.
"None" is a valid answer. -->

<!-- Optional sections used when relevant:
## Design Decisions — options considered, with a recommendation
## Industry Benchmarks — typical real-world values for validation
## References — papers, models, or tools the approach draws from
-->
